positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration featuring a collection of whimsical woodland animals—a friendly bear, a fox, a deer, and a squirrel—interacting happily in a lush, glowing forest clearing. The composition must be perfectly centered, using clean silhouettes and strong, contrasting shapes suitable for a t-shirt print. Focus on bold outlines and a graphic, flat vector art style, reminiscent of mid-century Scandinavian folk art. The color palette should be warm jewel tones (deep emerald green, burnt orange, sapphire blue, mustard yellow) against a creamy, light background. High contrast, clear linework, detailed foliage in the background, full body character poses. Vector illustration, sticker sheet style, highly detailed, print-ready, symmetrical composition, clean background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noise, photographic, realistic, deep shadows, gradient, gradient colors
